infotexts.entitydescription.ea_scrapworkbench: A makeshift workbench made out of scrap. Only the most basic of weapons can be crafted here.
infotexts.entitydescription.ea_basicworkbench: A basic workbench that allows you to craft simple weapons and armor to deal with the occasional threat.
infotexts.entitydescription.ea_basicblueprint: Those could be used to upgrade the Scrap Workbench.
infotexts.entitydescription.ea_advancedblueprint: A set of instructions to further upgrade the Basic Workbench.
infotexts.entitydescription.alienblueprint: A very powerful alien power source that could be used to fabricate very advanced weapons and armors.
infotexts.entitydescription.ea_eoka: A VERY unreliable gun that shoots either a powerful shot weak against armor or confettis. May the RNG gods be by your sides.
infotexts.entitydescription.ea_scrmachete: A simple machete made from scrap metal. Not very sharp.
infotexts.entitydescription.ea_bat: A crude bat made from scrap metal. Not very effective.
infotexts.entitydescription.ea_shiv: A makeshift very sharp stabbing knife. It is howerver poorly made and will break after a few cuts.
